message:
fix(distributed): reset recovering flag on decoder error paths in RecoveryOrchestrator

recover_from_symbols() set self.recovering = true but failed to reset it
if decoder.add_symbol() or decode_snapshot() returned an error via `?`.
This left the orchestrator permanently stuck in recovering state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
